description: Implement HandoffMarkdown in Charter.Core so the Category=HandoffMarkdown tests pass: walk BlockDocument.Parse's ordered blocks and re-emit each by Kind - Prose/Heading/List/Table/Code pass through verbatim; Note/Warn strip their ':::' fence and become a labeled blockquote; Comparison strips its fence and keeps its already-plain inner list; Diagram/Diff strip their fence and become a ```mermaid/```diff fenced code block; Question resolves via the answers lookup to prose (or a flagged open-question line when unanswered), NEVER the raw JSON body. Do NOT edit the tests.
